cards.back: To adjust the data transfer rate between devices in a network

cards.front: Why is it important to vary bandwidth?
cards.back: To accommodate devices with different speeds and to prevent network congestion

cards.front: What is a common method to vary bandwidth?
cards.back: Using Quality of Service (QoS) policies or prioritizing traffic

cards.front: What is the purpose of bandwidth shaping?
cards.back: To limit the amount of data transmitted by a specific device or user

cards.front: What is a benefit of varying bandwidth?
cards.back: Improved network performance and reduced congestion
